Change.Attribute: Damage ramping fall-off after not looking at a target:

Change.After: Basic attacks against champions now deal 50% damage
Health per stack doubled, stack rate reduced by half.
Now gives a Prismatic if this is your first or second augment, otherwise it will give a Gold augment.
Changed to Auto cast every 25 seconds instead of just exploding once.
On takedown reduce Hijack's lockout and cooldown by 20%.
Now locks your Attack Speed at 0.65 and only grants AS if you would go above the cap.
Explosion delay now scales inversely with distance, so long range hits will have a much lower delay, while point blank hits are increased slightly.
Capstone: Whenever you spend 400 mana, increase Juiced damage by 10% for the rest of the round.
When removed or replaced, gain gold equal to 30% of the gold gained by Fire Sale.
Auto levels based on levels put into the rice augments.
Auto levels based on levels put into the rice augments.
Refresh on Respawn or every 70 seconds
Stacks now reset based on a 15s duration instead of a fixed timer
Stacks show up on buff bar
Now works on permanent Augments and item effects, including: Phenomenal Evil, Infinite Recursion, Tank Engine, Heart Steel, Hubris, Yun Tal Wild Arrows
On-death True Damage is now Magic Damage
Now counts as a burn source when gaining Red Buff from an ally leveling this augment.
When removed, gain 2 Prismatic Stat Anvils.
Can now only appear if you have Shardblade.
Instantly grants a Stat Anvil and now grants another Stat Anvil every round.
